meta_description: Learn how to client workflow and overcome can't debug code. A Beginner-level Tutorial using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Client Workflow to Solve Can't Debug Code
content.seo_description: Learn how to master client workflow and overcome debugging hurdles. A beginner-level guide using Antigravity and Claude Code to ship projects faster.
content.answer_block: Stop staring at cryptic errors. By integrating a structured client workflow with Antigravity and Claude Code, you transform debugging from a manual nightmare into an automated process. This approach isolates bugs, generates surgical fixes, and maintains codebase integrity, allowing you to ship professional-grade software for your clients consistently and efficiently.
content.intro:
The screen flickers with a stack trace that looks like a foreign language. You have a deadline in four hours, the client is pinging you for updates, and you are stuck in a loop of broken dependencies and 'undefined is not a function.' This is the freelancer's purgatory—the point where your profit margin evaporates into the ether of unresolved bugs.

But what if debugging wasn't a manual chore? By shifting your architecture toward an AI-augmented client workflow, you can offload the cognitive load of syntax hunting to specialized agents. We are moving beyond guesswork and into precision engineering, turning your environment into a self-healing machine that keeps your reputation—and your income—intact.

steps.title: Initialize the Diagnostic Environment
steps.description: Establish a clean state before attempting a fix to ensure you aren't fighting ghost variables. We use Antigravity to map the dependency tree.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and identify potential dependency conflicts that could trigger runtime errors.

steps.title: Isolate the Failure Point
steps.description: Use Claude Code to trace the execution path. Don't guess where the error lives; let the agent pinpoint the exact line of code causing the crash.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a unit test that replicates the reported bug based on the error log provided.

steps.title: Generate Surgical Fixes
steps.description: Apply a targeted patch. By providing the context of your client requirements, the AI ensures the fix doesn't break existing features.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Propose a code fix that resolves the bug while adhering to the existing project style guide and performance constraints.

steps.title: Regression Testing for Stability
steps.description: Verify the fix hasn't introduced new issues. This step protects your client relationship by ensuring the code remains production-ready.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Run a full regression suite and highlight any performance degradation caused by the recent patch.

steps.title: Document and Ship
steps.description: Automate the changelog. Clients love transparency; provide them with a clear summary of the issue resolved without the manual paperwork.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a concise summary of the bug, the root cause, and the fix implemented for the client status report.

pro_tips: Always commit a 'checkpoint' branch before running AI-suggested code fixes to ensure instant rollback.
Use Claude Code's memory feature to store client-specific coding standards for consistent output across multiple projects.
If an error persists, pipe the verbose stack trace directly into Antigravity rather than summarizing it manually.
Treat every bug as a documentation opportunity: use the AI to update your README and technical specs simultaneously.
Configure Antigravity to ignore node_modules or build folders to speed up token processing and reduce costs.
resources: Best Practices for Freelance Devs: https://github.com/freelance-dev-handbook
content.next_steps: Implement this workflow on your smallest current project to build confidence before scaling it to your larger client enterprise apps.
content.conversion_block: You now have the technical blueprint to stop fighting code and start scaling your freelance business. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
